results.title: The Ram
results.overview: A man is given a loyalty test from God involving his neglected daughter.

results.title: Terror en Buenos Aires
results.overview: A girl who had been kidnapped for two months escapes from her rapist. On the sidewalk, she begs a stranger for help, not knowing that she is signing her own death sentence.

results.title: The Festival Run
results.overview: When James is looking to submit his new short film to a festival, chaos ensues when he realises he submitted the wrong film.

results.title: Mingus and The Massive Cock Mountain
results.original_title: Mingus and The Massive Cock Mountain
results.overview: Nate Mingus returns for another special after ‘Nate Mingus's Special Day’

results.title: What Remains at Dawn
results.overview: In Singapore, executions take place at dawn. Years after her brother’s death sentencing for drug trafficking, a sister duo continues their early-morning journeys, carrying the quiet aftermath of a punishment the city no longer sees.

results.title: The Thing, The Woods, And I
results.original_title: The Thing, The Woods, And I
results.overview: The Thing, The Woods, And I is a comedy where a group of filmmaking students attempt to make a movie, but face errors, mistakes, and more due to the strong oddball personalities of those both behind and in front of the camera.

results.title: A Drop In't Ocean
results.overview: A horned child awakes in an abandoned seaside town. Trying to find his way home he meets a fowl mouthed cat and a selection of eccentric and unhelpful locals. But something else is also following him. A short film about isolation and disassociation with a northern British comedy twist.

results.title: What Have You Done To Me?
results.original_title: What Have You Done To Me?
results.overview: A short film based on the internet’s influence on identity and how it can shape our society, ideologies, beliefs, interests, style and perception of the world. Showcased in three narrative stages - Oblivion, Recognition and Discovery which follows a protagonist who faces these challenges of accepting their identity without the misconstrued influences of the internet and social media. The film touches on the grip the internet has on society, and the nature of repressing your identity to fit in. Using Mandelbro's song 'What Have You Done To Me' and 'The Optimist Playbook' to push the themes of personal identity and optimism when confronting the world and humanity. Also, using Djo's song 'On and On' to highlight the addictive nature of consumption. Amid negativity and an everlasting changing world, you can be yourself without having to 'fit in' by approaching an optimistic perspective and seeing where life takes you. In a world of fear, confusion, hate and judgement, choose joy.

results.title: The Noice Boys
results.overview: Noice is back on tour, now with a new lineup and new material being performed live for the first time in 28 years. The documentary follows the band both on and off stage through concerts, rehearsals, and travel, and explores how their return connects to their breakthrough and role in the Swedish music scene in the early 1980s.

results.title: Our Secrets
results.overview: Film selected for the Cannes Film Festival La Cinéf competition lineup.

results.title: Made of Meat
results.overview: An ordinary man experiences the mental consequences that come with watching gore videos.

results.title: Teatres de campanya_Interferència 01: Promeses i accidents
results.original_title: Teatres de campanya_Interferència 01: Promeses i accidents
results.overview: While two politicians prepare for Barcelona’s mayoral campaign in an office, outside, the Brigades de Confusió Popular exorcise the ghosts of Olympic urban planning. Filmmaker Àlex Sardà documents the first Interferència de Teatres de campanya, created by artist Marc Salicrú and carried out at Nova Icària Beach in Barcelona on September 21 and 22, 2024.

results.title: GEMA
results.overview: Drowning in guilt after the loss of her brother, Nova finds an unexpected presence that helps her finally embrace her path.

results.title: Blood Orange
results.overview: A young teenage romance full of love and erotic desire slowly unravels into a  stylistic thrilling tale of obsession

results.title: Blood Orange
results.overview: A young teenage romance full of love and erotic desire slowly unravels into a  stylistic thrilling tale of obsession

results.title: "Remember Me :)"
results.overview: A story about the memories of two best friends during high school.

results.title: We Act Like Children
results.overview: Rooted in the universal experience of feeling stuck, this gentle story follows two siblings who retreat from an uncertain future, seeking shelter from the challenges waiting just beyond their reach.

results.title: The Babble Of The Brook
results.overview: After the death of her mother, a daughter attempts to connect with her father -- with whom she does not share a mother tongue -- while learning to survive in her new reality, one where grief is present.  A poetic journey through space and time, based on a true story.

results.title: Sofa King Great
results.overview: Documentary about the French instrumental math rock band Totorro

results.title: Andromeda
results.overview: After her mothers funeral, Janie is visited by a teenage version of her mother, Alison, that same night.

results.title: Bianca di notte
results.overview: In the cemetery of a small southern town, the voices of young girls speaking in the Neapolitan dialect guide a journey that hovers between reality and imagination.

results.title: Best of Luck
results.overview: A selfish and destructive android adapts to the life of a cowboy in the desert wasteland.

results.title: Night Plane
results.overview: Local filmmaker Salise Hughes returns with a dream about clouds and lightning and travel.

results.title: Nafron
results.overview: In a country undergoing an awakening, a middle-aged woman wanders through war-torn Damascus. Just a few weeks after Assad’s fall she is searching for herself as she has lost her memory. When her path crosses Amira’s, the two women may just change each other's lives by providing the answers each is looking for.

results.title: Rosario arde
results.overview: Through the testimony of Jaime Rippa, Rosario Arde reconstructs the birth of Argentine experimental art and the development of Tucumán Arde—a collective action that shattered the boundaries between art and politics to denounce exploitation, censorship, and silence in 1968 Argentina.

results.title: Nueva correspondencia francesa
results.overview: Over coffee at La Biela, an Argentine filmmaker evokes her relationship with cinema: the now-vanished theaters that marked her youth, the adaptation of an Adolfo Bioy Casares short story, and the epistolary relationship she maintained with François Truffaut.

results.title: Brainstorm: Unraveling the Mysteries of the Brain
results.original_title: Brainstorm: Unraveling the Mysteries of the Brain
results.overview: Dr. lan Whishaw and Dr. Bryan Kolb make history by publishing the first textbook on brain function, laying the foundation for global neuroscience education. These small-town neuroscientists revolutionize our understanding of the brain, develop prevention strategies for brain disorders, and establish programs to improve brain health, showcasing the power of science and collaboration.

results.title: Rua (This Is Not a Movie, It's a Comet)
results.original_title: Rua (Isto não é um filme, é um cometa)
results.overview: A journey through the universe of musician and composer Vítor Rua, from pop-rock music to opera, passing through repetitive-minimalism and improvised music.

results.title: Our Backyard Hist'ry
results.overview: A Conductor of Ann Arbor's Underground Railroad Tour and a sole survivor of the greatest generation that ever lived, Scott F. McFadden's graphic description of history tells it like it was, and still is. A voice, so clear and with such passion, it speaks for an era without bitterness or self-pity among the dying and already dead. take a tour with us as we share Our Backyard Hist'ry.

results.title: CYANOTYPE
results.overview: Photographer Pauly V. navigates life with chronic illness through Eco-experimental film photography.

results.title: Carta a Bárbara
results.overview: Emiliano is preparing to confess his love to Bárbara through a letter, but an unexpected accident forces him to express what he feels in a more courageous way.

results.title: The Window Was Open on an April Afternoon
results.original_title: The Window Was Open on an April Afternoon
results.overview: Pablo, a pet bird, lives a long, monotonous, and consistent ten years. After his death, his owner reevaluates the pair’s connection, as she experiences true grief for the first time.

results.title: ALLOY OF FEAR
results.overview: Rafael, filled with anxiety, heads to a secluded spot in the forest, where he encounters a group of masked men. There, he hands over the murder weapon and Amalia's braid as evidence. In exchange, the leader, a man in a clown mask, gives him a suitcase of drugs and a new gun—a mission Rafael cannot bear to undertake. When he refuses, the clown threatens him that if he does not obey, his family will pay the price. The mental burden becomes unbearable. Later, the masked men discuss the events of the day, unaware that Rafael, unable to bear it any longer, has ended his life.

results.title: Matrescence
results.overview: A woman sends a voice memo to a friend about the unexpected upheavals of her transition to motherhood. Matrescence blends visual exploration with scientific insight to examine the neurological, identity and cellular transformations that occur during pregnancy. A bold, intimate short film that illuminates the immense power of this journey.

results.title: CYANOTYPE
results.overview: Photographer Pauly V. navigates life with chronic illness through Eco-experimental film photography.

results.title: Carta a Bárbara
results.overview: Emiliano is preparing to confess his love to Bárbara through a letter, but an unexpected accident forces him to express what he feels in a more courageous way.

results.title: The Window Was Open on an April Afternoon
results.original_title: The Window Was Open on an April Afternoon
results.overview: Pablo, a pet bird, lives a long, monotonous, and consistent ten years. After his death, his owner reevaluates the pair’s connection, as she experiences true grief for the first time.

results.title: ALLOY OF FEAR
results.overview: Rafael, filled with anxiety, heads to a secluded spot in the forest, where he encounters a group of masked men. In exchange, the leader, a man in a clown mask, gives him a suitcase of drugs and a new gun—a mission Rafael cannot bear to undertake. Later, the masked men discuss the events of the day, unaware that Rafael, unable to bear it any longer, has ended his life.

results.title: Matrescence
results.overview: A woman sends a voice memo to a friend about the unexpected upheavals of her transition to motherhood. Matrescence blends visual exploration with scientific insight to examine the neurological, identity and cellular transformations that occur during pregnancy. A bold, intimate short film that illuminates the immense power of this journey.

results.title: Cookie Fight 2
results.overview: It’s Christmas, and Elias and Spyros are once again fighting over the last two cookies. But a more powerful enemy, Cookie Panda, defeats them and eats the second-to-last cookie. Only by working together can they defeat him. Who will get to eat the last cookie?

results.title: Auto da Casa
results.overview: A theatre having national as part of its name, at the top of a square, reflecting a country’s history. But which one? This is a voyage through the various narratives about D. Maria II National Theatre, forged through the intentions of the several regimes that intended to convey their own ideologies within the theatre’s mission. This is also the story of those who fought against it, opposed the institution and became part of it. How can one become heir of these stories, even if never having set foot inside.

results.title: Sous le Soleil du Kwat (Under the Borough Sun)
results.overview: A portrait of love caught at the edge of sacrifice and new horizons, Sous le Soleil du Kwat (Under the Borough Sun) lets a tender love story unfold in the vibrance of Cameroon’s streets—until a revelation threatens to change everything.

results.title: Personality Quiz
results.overview: A young man returns home after a long day to find an ominous presence lurking in his home.

results.title: Noctis Monstorum
results.overview: A man battles an annual onslaught of horror to protect the children of his neighborhood.

results.title: Bubba
results.overview: At 12, Nirmal leaves his village in India for Canada during Partition. Narrated by present-day Nirmal and shaped through abstract imagery, Bubba reflects on assimilation and identity loss.

results.title: Under the Red Roof
results.overview: In the coastal town of Shakotan, Hokkaido, Nozuka Elementary School prepares to close after 134 years as the region's population declines. Taiyo, a quiet second grader, is one of the final four students to pass through its halls before the school shuts its doors.

results.title: Happy tho' inn a Dream
results.overview: An electronic music creator composes using 80s analog synthesizers. Athens Computer Underground creates tracks that balance between raw acid, urban poetry, and melancholic soundtracks.

results.title: Connection—Fantasy
results.overview: A fire burns in the dark. This film follows four voices speaking of their connection to nature. From different lands, they meet online to share memories and sensations. Amid urban birds, smog, clichéd forests, and landscapes of development, the film traces the feeling called 'connection' and the layers of fantasy around it.

results.title: Starting over
results.overview: Gayoung and Seungju go to sort through their friend Jiwon's belongings. Among the items Jiwon left behind, they encounter secrets they've each kept hidden. The moments of that day, when they couldn't cross the crosswalk, come flooding back.

results.title: Dear Fan
results.overview: Martial law and the square that sweeped South Korea. The same fans I saw at the concert halls were there. Dear you, who brought your light to the square.

results.title: Twig
results.overview: Over the course of a summer day at the skate park, a determined 10-year-old boy struggles to land the simplest trick. As he attempts to drop into the pool, he uncovers a group of skaters, their troubled pasts, and something deeper within himself.

results.title: Water in the Balance
results.overview: Though Taiwan's rainfall is three times the global average, its uneven distribution creates striking scarcity. Water gives and takes; it sustains life yet brings destruction. Following the sound of currents, the film reflects on water's shifting states, capturing the emotional and spiritual ties woven between people, memory and the surrounding tides.

results.title: Farewell, My Nest
results.overview: After a deadly fire in a Beijing migrant workers’ housing block in 2017, authorities launched sweeping safety inspections, forcibly evicting residents and demolishing homes. The filmmaker follows workers across urban villages, observing their livelihoods and reflecting on class realities under China’s household registration system.

results.title: Misery and Other Choices
results.overview: The world sizzles with climate change. A politician lets it burn. A young couple finds out they are pregnant. What should they do if they find the politician alone and barely breathing? A darkly comic drama that asks what will you do when the world is on fire?

results.title: A Flower Falling Back Into the Earth
results.original_title: A Flower Falling Back Into the Earth
results.overview: This film emerged from footage originally captured for a feature documentary on enforced disappearances among Sri Lanka’s Tamil population—specifically, an interview with a mother whose son vanished in the war’s final stages.

results.title: One Last Detour
results.overview: After agreeing to drive him to a job interview, Dean reconnects with his old friend Travis.

results.title: Iron Maiden: Burning Passion
results.overview: IRON MAIDEN: BURNING AMBITION explores how Iron Maiden has helped shape a cultural movement, challenging conventional views of rock music and heavy metal’s broader impact on society and culture. Featuring interviews with the band and contributors such as Javier Bardem, Lars Ulrich, and Chuck D, this electrifying film offers an intimate look at their uncompromising vision and unwavering connection with their global army of fans.

results.title: The Lomax Delusion
results.overview: A gifted psychologist has her life turned upside during her first session with a new patient - a troubled young man with a unique and disturbing theory of the world.

results.title: Cola and Ocha
results.overview: As Haku and Kaho prepare for their wedding, Kaho finds a picture book titled "The Little Bird," written by Haku's ex-lover, So. After reading it aloud, Haku recalls that his diploma is still at So's place. And Haku and Kaho head to there together.

results.title: Drift Wood
results.overview: Paralyzed by the fear of the misty unknown, the protagonist was self-imprisoned, only to break free from their confines after confronting the reality of their stagnant self.

results.title: Missed call
results.overview: I work at a call center making a graduation documentary. One ear to the phone, straining toward the past, the future, anywhere but here—calls find me: their voices, silences, sighs—worthless, discarded—passing through me into the partition as faint, indelible stains. Messages accumulate in a voicemail left unopened.

results.title: A thread left
results.overview: Twenty years after losing touch, two cousins, Giyoung and Hyunwoo, spend an ordinary day together. From meeting at a subway station to parting there, the landscapes and objects around them quietly reveal the time each of them has carried.

results.title: The Epic of Enkidu
results.overview: When the catastrophic King Gilgamesh meets the grass-fed Enkidu, things don't go according to the clay tablets.

results.title: Тень
results.overview: New cartoon by Alexander Yargunin (SPbGIKiT).

results.title: phototropes
results.overview: Finding accord among the photosensitive inhabitants of Frankfurt's Palmengarten as they absorb, transform and transfer the late summer light.

results.title: Boop-Boop-a-Doop
results.overview: A revenge slasher based on Betty Boop, only surviving as promotional materials

results.title: Anderes
results.overview: A young photographer struggles to finish an overdue project while constantly being pulled away by new opportunities. As pressure builds and the deadline approaches, he is forced to confront the version of himself that keeps avoiding responsibility and decide whether he can finally change.

results.title: The Worm
results.overview: Bill Razor, a retired "Counter Terrestrial" operative, lives a quiet life in the middle of nowhere. That life ends when a mysterious package arrives, unleashing a lethal alien parasite. Now, Razor must fight his way through a web of betrayal and government corruption to stop the creature. He is the world’s last line of defense: if the worm gets out, humanity falls.

results.title: LA FAMILLE
results.overview: The TV glowed, and Zoe didn’t know where she ended — or where it began.

results.title: All That We Inherit
results.overview: After their mother’s death, estranged siblings Nina and Gagan return to their childhood home in North Goa. As routines resume and decisions loom, their opposing ways of grieving surface, forcing them to confront loss, belonging, and what it means to move on.

results.title: Cat-Tasrophe
results.overview: While searching for his missing cat, Conrad meets an unlikely friend.

results.title: A Fiction Film
results.overview: In the late 1950s, a teenage couple tries to arrange a date at a small-town movie theater. It's all just memory.

results.title: Dinamita
results.overview: After a harsh breakup, a soul-crushing job, and the pain of watching her ex move on with someone new, Cristina reaches a breaking point. What starts as a fleeting intrusive thought turns into a wild, reckless plan to erase him from her life — a choice that will send her down a path with no way back.

results.title: GALICIA NON ARDE
results.overview: “GALICIA NON ARDE” is a short film that expresses the pain behind each provoked fire in Galicia during the summer of 2025.  A young man goes to his town in Lugo after learning from the media that it is on fire, evoking a strong feeling inside him.  Through photography, color, and sound, it seeks to create a sensory space where viewers can immerse themselves in a complete experience.

results.title: Into the Belly of the Beast
results.overview: Sato is a young man consumed by a desire to eat human flesh. One day, he stumbles upon a discarded phone outside the hostess club where he works, which entangles him in the shady underbelly of society. As he sinks deeper into the criminal underworld, Sato's twisted hunger grows — until he finally kills to satisfy his craving for human flesh.

results.title: In Her Care
results.overview: A poetic exploration of the Black healthcare industry through the personal history of Philadelphia nurse Patricia Curtis.

results.title: Muljil: Diving
results.overview: Yang Young-sam, a 77-year-old haenyeo (female freediver) battling dementia, prepares for a final ritual goodbye.

results.title: the great image has no form - notes on the creation of identifying symbols
results.original_title: a gran imaxe non ten forma - apuntamentos sobre a creacion de símbolos identitarios
results.overview: Víctor is thinking about his friend Mario. Mario was a little nervous in the summer of 2024. He was falling in love with Sara, a girl he met on twitter around that time, and he's an overthinker... Everytime he started overthinking stuff, he went outside to find some calm and solace in nature. For years, Mario and Víctor have been talking about their concerns with the limitations and contradictions in the relationship between representation and identity. But lately, this conversation has tilted especially towards the problematics in the representation of landscapes and nature. They always try looking beyond the western capitalist framework to find new possibilities, forever in search of that formless great image. However, Mario's too in love to concentrate on these topics like he usually does... all he can think of is how much he wishes Sara was there with him: to look at that sunset together, to be together (in) that same space and time.

results.title: Marseille, 14 juillet
results.overview: A night of jubilation erupts in Marseille following Algeria's victory in the 2019 Africa Cup of Nations. Thousands of people celebrate fervently in the Old Port and on the Canebière, recreating a vibrant link between Algiers and Marseille. Between collective joy, urban tensions, and historical echoes, this memorable interlude transcends simple sporting triumph to become an expression of national pride and a complex dialogue with colonial history and the Republic.

results.title: Cabinet
results.overview: Cabinet (2026)  Genre: Mystery, Thriller, Science Fiction  In a shadowy, bureaucratic organization known only as The Workplace, recruits are subjected to a ritual of initiation involving a mysterious cabinet—an anomaly that assigns them a partner whose identity is inexplicably implanted into their minds. The process, shrouded in secrecy, is designed to minimize accidents in the field. But when one recruit lingers inside for an unprecedented 48 seconds, seasoned agent Alice begins to question everything she thought she understood about her job.  As Alice and her new recruit navigate a world of hidden threats, underground dealings, and inexplicable phenomena, a desperate search leads Alice to confront the limits of knowledge, safety, and certainty.  Blending existential horror with a noir-infused investigative thriller, Cabinet is a chilling descent into the boundaries of reality and the cost of uncovering hidden truths.

results.title: The Knock
results.overview: Alone in a crumbling house, a failed filmmaker’s quiet night takes a terrifying turn after a knock at the door forces her to confront everything she tried to forget.

results.title: On The Contrary
results.overview: If one becomes the very character of the story they wanted to tell or portray, is that a source of comfort or the ultimate discomfort?

results.title: Rewind
results.overview: After being left a box of junk, Finn discovers a watch with a unique ability.

results.title: Water Related Death
results.overview: Mondo style gore mixtape with a primary theme regarding water related death.

results.title: The Fitzroy's Fastest Bowler
results.overview: Fitzroy bowlers Jack, Brad and Oskar face a very serious issue, one that only a true hero can face.

results.title: Lucky Bastard
results.overview: Is Luck Real? Miles Foster is the subject of a sick experiment where a man tests the limit of invisible human powers which in this film is Luck.

results.title: Medios Días
results.overview: Camila drifts through a quiet routine of isolation, until an unexpected visit opens a crack in her day.

results.title: Agatha
results.overview: A murdered victim of abuse returns to take revenge on humanity, drawn toward a young man whose troubled psyche may draw more similarites to the dead than he first thought.

results.title: Doña Quijuca de Las siete Villas
results.original_title: Doña Quijuca de Las siete Villas

results.original_title: Doña Quijuca de Las siete Villas

results.title: VIOLATION
results.overview: A new safety hire reenacts the company's past workplace tragedies to convince her coworkers that ignoring safety protocols can heave deadly consequences.

results.title: Kiralık Koca: Aşk mı? Oyun mu?
results.original_title: Kiralık Koca: Aşk mı? Oyun mu?

results.title: Siegfried's Death
results.overview: Siegried plays dead.

results.title: AFTERSLICE
results.overview: A guy wants to enjoy a slice of pizza, but a traumatic event from his past comes back to haunt him.

results.title: Nenaboozhoo
results.overview: A traditionally animated in-language Anishinaabe story of how the arrow got its feathers.

results.title: Convenience Store NDN Zombie
results.overview: Zoe and Benny are in love. Benny dies the night before Halloween and is reanimated as a zombie. Claire, Zoe’s best friend, has nefarious intentions.

results.title: Escape!
results.overview: Four friends wake up and find themselves trapped in an unfamiliar room, disoriented and without their phones. As confusion gives way to tension, they search for answers, grappling with rising paranoia, fractured memories, and the tickling pressure of a mysterious countdown. With no clear idea of how they go there and no way out, they are forced to confront not only their circumstances but also each other.

results.title: Spielfeld der Macht - Die WM in Trumps Amerika
results.original_title: Spielfeld der Macht - Die WM in Trumps Amerika

results.title: Gareth Southgate: Changing the Game for Young Men
results.original_title: Gareth Southgate: Changing the Game for Young Men
results.overview: Former England men's football manager Gareth Southgate reveals the struggles many boys and young men face, asking why some feel left behind and what could help them move forward.

results.title: Vidéo maison
results.overview: How to live as a lesbian during the rise of fascism?

results.title: Crush
results.overview: Solange is a well-ordered wife and mother. She has great admiration for her sister-in-law Juliette, who has just left her husband. Like a fairy godmother, Solange decides to introduce Juliette to a former colleague. Dimitri is handsome and very charismatic. But could Solange be betraying her own desires by offering him to Juliette?

results.title: Capsule
results.overview: In an enclosed studio, a photographer and a writer drift between creation and desire.

results.title: Message to Ezra
results.overview: An unexpected Instagram follow sends two high schoolers into a tailspin.

results.title: Crush
results.overview: Solange is a well-ordered wife and mother. She has great admiration for her sister-in-law Juliette, who has just left her husband. Like a fairy godmother, Solange decides to introduce Juliette to a former colleague. Dimitri is handsome and very charismatic. But could Solange be betraying her own desires by offering him to Juliette?

results.title: Capsule
results.overview: In an enclosed studio, a photographer and a writer drift between creation and desire.

results.title: Message to Ezra
results.overview: An unexpected Instagram follow sends two high schoolers into a tailspin.

results.title: Sink
results.overview: The third short film by Edward Pettitt.

results.title: Kiralık Koca: Aşk mı, Oyun mu?
results.original_title: Kiralık Koca: Aşk mı, Oyun mu?
results.overview: To escape her father's pressure to get married, Melike tells a lie and makes a deal with Ali, a charming con man, for a two-month fake marriage in exchange for money. However, Ali demands to move his own unrefined family into Melike's house as part of the deal. With women constantly chasing Ali, items mysteriously disappearing from the house, and an over-the-top fake mother-in-law, things quickly spiral out of control for Melike. Despite the ongoing chaos and her constant bickering with Ali, she must keep up the charade to avoid getting caught by her father and being forced to marry a complete stranger.

results.title: Moolyam
results.overview: Gopal, a voluntary teacher, faces a strange form of discrimination at his new posting but chooses to resist and assert his rights.

results.title: THE IDOLM@STER Gakuen The 2nd Period
results.original_title: 学園アイドルマスター The 2nd Period
results.overview: THE IDOLM@STER Gakuen The 2nd Period (学園アイドルマスター The 2nd Period) was a live concert event that took place in the following locations and dates:  The 2nd Period H.I.F Senbatsu Shiken (Selection) (The 2nd Period H.I.F 選抜試験（セレクション）): Makuhari Messe Event Hall in Chiba, on May 15th and 16th, 2026.  The 2nd Period Hatsuboshi IDOL FESTIVAL: Yokohama Arena in Yokohama on June 6th and 7th, 2026.  The former will feature the characters performing (as 3D-CG models), and the latter will feature their voice actresses performing.

results.title: What Happens in Vegas
results.overview: Angel and Sisterfriend are outsiders living in stark contrast with their idyllic, monotonous suburb. Dressed in black and protected by goth aesthetics on the outside, Angel and Sisterfriend are soft on the inside. They're barely adults, still learning how to express themselves. They find refuge and safety in their sisterfriendship. When Angel secretly becomes obsessed with finding out "what happens in Vegas," she tries everything. Praying to God. A seance. But nothing can answer the question at hand. While Angel wonders if there is life beyond the subdivision, Sisterfriend must grapple with the thought of losing her friend to the big city.

results.title: The Ropes
results.overview: Short by Erica Schreiner

results.title: Free Fall – Who You Are
results.overview: Years after his life was turned upside down by a secret love affair with fellow police officer Kay, Marc is still caught between two worlds – the life he built and the truth he can no longer deny. Free Fall – Who You Are is a recut and reimagined version of the 2013 film Freier Fall, expanding the story beyond coming out into the question of what happens when an honest life truly begins. The first chapter of the Free Fall Trilogy.

results.title: Banana Plant
results.overview: A Puerto Rican family living in Rochester, New York, takes great care of the banana trees in their garden. When winter arrives, they dig up the plants and bring them indoors to protect them from the cold. With the arrival of spring, the trees return to the earth, creating a cyclic ritual that repeats itself year after year. Through this caring activity, Migdalia and Fernando maintain a living link with their roots, and their work becomes both an act of resilience and a way of dealing with their diasporic identity.

results.title: Béal
results.overview: Béal is a 16 mm film that explores the intertwined histories, communities, and daily lives of Toronto’s Cabbagetown and Regent Park. Extending to the Don Valley and Don River—lands and waterways long used by Indigenous peoples as gathering, fishing, and travel routes—the film situates these neighbourhoods within a deeper landscape of history and movement. Later shaped by Irish immigration during the 1847 famine, the area evolved through poverty, working-class settlement, and the creation of Regent Park as Canada’s first large-scale social housing project. Today, cycles of redevelopment and gentrification continue to transform the neighbourhoods, bringing new tensions and challenges. Through intimate collaborations with residents and community workers, Béal reflects on resilience, displacement, and the enduring connections between past and present in the city’s changing urban fabric.

results.title: For Sale
results.overview: So many things are sold in this world. Desires, pleasures, happiness... or even life itself. At what cost?

results.title: De duistere kant van Forum voor Democratie
results.original_title: De duistere kant van Forum voor Democratie
results.overview: What happens behind the scenes at Forum voor Democratie? For this documentary, PowNed spoke with multiple sources who have been involved with the party and its environment for years. They discuss the culture, ideology, and ambitions within the movement and share their experiences with topics such as conspiracy theories, ideas surrounding white supremacy, and dealing with critics. Why are they choosing to tell their story now?

results.title: three twenty-five

results.title: Banana Plant
results.overview: A Puerto Rican family living in Rochester, New York, takes great care of the banana trees in their garden. When winter arrives, they dig up the plants and bring them indoors to protect them from the cold. With the arrival of spring, the trees return to the earth, creating a cyclic ritual that repeats itself year after year. Through this caring activity, Migdalia and Fernando maintain a living link with their roots, and their work becomes both an act of resilience and a way of dealing with their diasporic identity.

results.overview: This work portrays the perspective of someone who has experienced digital sexual abuse in Tokyo, such as deepfake pornography or non-consensual photography.  It is composed of 3D computer graphics animation and live performance video shot in public spaces.

results.overview: Alaina Bamfield is a New York based stand up comedian from Williamston, Michigan.  This is her debut special.  Recorded at the Independent Comedy Club in Hamtramck, Michigan.

results.title: Uposhongshar
results.overview: This story centers on a husband whose wife is in a coma, while he also cares for their young school-going daughter. It explores the emotional strain and fragile bond within the family, focusing on the husband’s struggle to balance hope, grief, and responsibility. As he navigates life between hospital visits and parenting, the narrative highlights the quiet tragedy and emotional complexity of loving someone who is physically present but unreachable, and the impact it has on their family’s chemistry.

results.title: Beyond Home

The film immerses the audience in the worlds of Samar, Batoul and Nibal who arrived five years ago and now live in the remote communities of Altena, a medieval town in the hills of the Sauerland, and on the tiny North Sea Island of Föhr.

Filmed during the second of two sold-out nights, this electrifying concert showcases her unmatched stage presence, powerful performances, and the deep bond she shares with thousands of fans. A historic celebration of music, passion, and the evolution of an artist at the peak of her career.

He does his best to get through the day but this time he decides to continue his escape, to a place he might not return from.

results.title: Isle Be Back
results.overview: Isle Be Back - A Love Letter to Arran is a vignette style of short film that shows the life style and visuals of living on The Isle of Arran, a Scottish island with a tight knit community.

results.title: Judge Me, I Walk on Glass
results.original_title: Dæmdu mig, ég geng á glerinu
results.overview: 'Judge Me, I Walk on Glass' deals with addiction through the life story of the director‘s son who has over the past 20 years struggled with the disease. The film follows his struggle while describing the author's experience as the mother of a child who developed an addiction from the age of 15.

results.title: White Road
results.overview: A young man drifts through boredom and thoughts of burden and desire, imagining distant ideals and the possibility of escape. Along the coast, he encounters an elusive woman who speaks of fleeting love and the uncertainty of where the wind may carry them.

results.title: Blank Canvas
results.overview: In the studio of painter Shun Kumashiro, curls of pipe smoke signal the work that is about to unfold. A line is drawn across a blank canvas, as alternating shots of the painter’s face and the surface reveal moments of pause, contemplation, and exuberance. Colours blend on the palette, and the brush moves swiftly across the canvas, forming a piece shaped through the interplay of image and music.

results.title: Hakata Dolls
results.overview: 8mm documentary that features the late Yoichi Kojima, a master of Hakata doll making. Produced at a time when the city of Fukuoka was beginning to recover from the ruins of war, the film captures nostalgic scenes of the cityscape, including the Hakata River and the Naka River, and areas around the old Hakata Station.

results.title: hindi dirinig ang taong nagdarahop sa sugat ng paligid na malimit niyang maabot
results.original_title: hindi dirinig ang taong nagdarahop sa sugat ng paligid na malimit niyang maabot
results.overview: This story follows a young woman returning from the city to her provincial hometown. She expects a comforting homecoming but instead finds tension with her mother who fails to recognize the present and different version of her. Driven by anger that is hard to place, this prompts her to experiment with experience and identity. As anger recedes, she makes an effort to reconcile with her mother. By the time she leaves for the city, a sense of connection to home returns to her. For even when they struggle to fully translate each other’s language for identity and love, they are, after all, home for each other.

results.overview: Finn, a naive bet strong-willed woman explores the dark forests where she discovers her love for the mysterious monster, Sally.

results.title: ORIKO-GUB
results.overview: A man thinks that he is being followed by a balloon.

results.title: Come On In
results.overview: A student documentary on Glasgow's publishing scene.

results.title: The History of Harriton
results.overview: Tucked away in the corner of Lower Merion is Harriton High School, a public school known for its competitive culture, distinguished extracurriculars and stellar educational quality. This documentary explores the deep, convoluted history of the school, tracing not only its 68 years of operation but also the origins of its name and land dating back to the mid-17th century. Created by a student at the school, this film includes interviews from past and present teachers, administrators, and students.

results.title: Conspiracy
results.overview: A stop-motion animated film about a wealthy, lonely art collector whose quiet life is disturbed by birds. This leads to a chase, after which he discovers the most beautiful artwork of his life.

results.title: The Archivist is dying
results.overview: Through the use of archival material and manipulated photographs to generate a memory, 'the archivist is dying' is a personal, experimental short, invoking the mystical and academic in composition of poetry. The project uses footage from American Folklife Center Archive, Alabama Department of Archives and History, Internet Archive, Prelinger Archives, Black Film Archives, YouTube, LAPL, and is sound designed using Free Sound, The WPA and the Slave Narrative Collection, and original audio.

results.title: Jusqu’à ce que l’orage nous sépare
results.original_title: Jusqu’à ce que l’orage nous sépare
results.overview: Milo and Luca are living in perfect bliss, isolated from the world. But when a storm breaks out in the distance, Milo's fear drives them to seek refuge deep inside the house. What was meant to be their safe haven slowly turns into an oppressive prison. To save their relationship, it won’t be enough to escape the storm outside — they’ll have to face the one raging within.

results.title: Robbery for Beginners
results.overview: Mikkel stages a fake robbery at the café he works at, hoping to impress his coworker by playing the hero.

results.title: Luis' Last Journey
results.overview: On May 30, 2023, the German mountaineer Luis Stitzinger was found dead at an altitude of 8,400 meters on Kangchenjunga, just five days after he reached the summit. It was his tenth eight-thousander. He had climbed seven of them with his wife, Alix von Melle. More than a year later, Alix travels to Nepal again to fulfill her husband’s last wish: scatter his ashes on one of the high peaks in the land of his dreams. The chosen mountain is the 7,246-meter peak Dhaulagiri VII in the Nepalese Himalayas.

results.title: Papa Told Me
results.overview: Emad, a 10-year-old boy, loves ice cream despite his father's strict ban. Forced to eat it in secret to avoid punishment, he imagines his father has eyes everywhere watching him. One day, noticing his father is unwell, Emad chooses to ignore the tension and finally eats his ice cream in front of him with a sense of liberated joy.

results.title: Bone Apetit
results.overview: A smiling woman gracefully runs her independently owned restaurant, gradually revealing the singular circumstances of her life.

results.title: Ausländertest
results.overview: NDR editor Navina Sundaram examines the majority perspective on the issue of racism. She highlights an experiment by the Greek anthropologist Georgios Tsiakalos at the University of Bremen, in which he wanted to demonstrate that misconceptions and prejudices towards minorities are not innate but acquired. A test subject’s muscle tension, temperature, and skin resistance are measured whilst she views a slide show: images of people labelled as »foreign«, as well as headlines, posters and graffiti for and against immigration.

results.title: Surface of the Film
results.overview: Surface of the Film carries the surface tension of film into the analog process of film development. The film appears as if immersed in a solution of chalk, soda, salt, and soap—the same mixture Soviet DIYers once used to whitewash hospitals, schools, and orphanages. Here, too, the layer both protects and attacks. It covers up, lets traces emerge, and carries scratches, stains, and blurs into the emulsion. Through its own material, the film searches for an equivalent to human vulnerability where gendered, trans, and female bodies seek protection while remaining exposed to the violence of the gaze.

results.title: Me And You
results.overview: Damien is a young man who has spent several years in the bustling city.He decides to attend a therapy session to talk about his challenges and share his experiences with a past relationship with someone he holds close to his heart.During this session, he learns to cope with his mental health struggles and discovers how to release the attachment to this person he once considered his everything.

results.title: Unseen Between Us
results.overview: My daughter dislikes having her picture taken; plagued by anxiety about her appearance, she has grown accustomed to hiding behind her glasses. Yet I, her mother, yearn to capture these moments—and, above all, to truly see my daughter. When she finally picks up the camera, the lens turns toward me—and, in doing so, turns back upon herself. Can we, through the eyes of another, learn once again to see ourselves?

results.title: The Last Stop

results.title: Bon voyage
results.overview: In their last taxi ride, the characters relive the joyful moments of their lives. Their memories intertwine, creating a shared picture of the beautiful and the melancholic.

Witness the Johnstown High School Big Red Band from an all-new perspective. Filmed entirely from a GoPro, 28 takes you through the entire 2025 marching season from Rookie Week in May to Varsity Show in November. See all the steps band members take to put together the sensational halftime shows the Big Red is known for, as well as all the shenanigans they get up to behind the scenes.

results.title: The Time Traveller’s Guide to Hamilton Gardens
results.original_title: The Time Traveller’s Guide to Hamilton Gardens
results.overview: How did a city rubbish dump transform into a collection of gardens that is now a major visitor attraction?  The story of how Hamilton Gardens became a unique museum of humanity, showcasing gardens from ancient Egypt to the surreal future, is told on screen.

results.title: The Highland Boutique
results.overview: When a world-famous rapper offers a dream job for watching over a suitcase full of weed, a recovering addict must resist the temptation of relapse to leave her boring job at a vintage clothing store.

results.title: Don't Delete the Kisses
results.overview: When a reserved girl and her best friend fall for each other in a simulation of her own creation, she accidentally releases her own unresolved feelings of love and is forced to face them, risking their relationship in real life.

results.title: Archura Leaves the City Forever
results.overview: A lost forest spirit named Archura explores New York and tries to find a home while confronting an urban landscape that is rapidly taken over by luxury developments.

results.title: That Sinking Feeling
results.overview: Misty awakes with a cold in a bed unfamiliar to her. At the foot of the bed, the owner of the place, Ashton, obsessively attends to her. He claims to have saved Misty from an accident in which she drove her car into a lake. Misty has no memory of this event and questions why she would act in such a way in the first place. Instead of easing her worries, Ashton leaves Misty alone so she can rest, but promises to check back in later. While trapped alone in the room, increasingly strange occurrences happen to Misty, and glimpses of the accident begin to surface. What truly happened at the lake? Who is Ashton, and does he know more than he lets on?

results.overview: A student director struggles to shoot the opening scene of her film.

results.title: Home Again
results.overview: Home Again centers around MARA, a young woman caregiving for her sick uncle under mysterious circumstances. Mara meets DOMINIC, a delivery driver, and they spark a connection. But is there enough time?

results.title: Remain
results.overview: In the modern age it's easier than ever to forsake the outside and remain on the inside.

results.title: Hit Me Harder
results.overview: A former boxer takes on one more fight after his brother dies in the ring

results.title: THE DUST OF MY CONCRETE CHILD - PORTRAIT 2: Viciousness & Vulnerability
results.original_title: THE DUST OF MY CONCRETE CHILD - PORTRAIT 2: Viciousness & Vulnerability

results.title: The Life of a Spy
results.overview: A rookie spy right after his first mission must grapple with if someone could have followed him to his safe house to steal his precious cargo

results.title: fotofiction
results.overview: fotoficion is built from photographs of the director's hometown taken since 2011. Some images were created using materials from the land—cuttlefish bones, bird feathers, and organic matter from her family's tangerine farm—imprinted onto analog film. The work unfolds as an ongoing narrative of memory where home, land, and generational time overlap.

results.title: What The World Needs Right Now Is Passion
results.original_title: What The World Needs Right Now Is Passion
results.overview: After watching everyone around him get opportunities, a young actor, Jacob struggles to regain his former glory and make art while his world crumbles around him.

results.title: Me, You, and the Camera
results.overview: Individuals deal with consequences of the digital age.

results.title: Open Taxi
results.overview: Jessie and Margot meet by chance encounter at a house party the night of their high school graduation. What follows is a summer of adventure, and a year that will reveal their feelings towards relationships and the futures that will get in the way of theirs.

results.title: The Space Between
results.overview: After a failed suicide attempt, art student Evangelina Roman finds herself in a surreal liminal space between life and death. There, she meets Evi, a 17th-century girl who helps Evangelina rediscover her passion and will to live through art and self-acceptance.

results.title: Me, You and the Cow
results.overview: Martina, addicted to her phone, is taken by her father to a rehab center with an unusual therapy: healing through bonding with cows. Far from Wi-Fi and close to what hurts, she will have to face what she’s been avoiding.

results.title: Around The Clock
results.overview: As a single mother, Irena has to divide her time between caring for her family and working a fulltime job, however, luckily, her coworkers and other women in her life that share her struggles try their best to help her out in this monotonous routine.

results.title: Egg Yolk Custard Bun
results.overview: At a dim sum table where food meets kink, three friends push playfulness and intimacy to its sticky, steamy edges—until a sudden interruption.

results.title: The Highland Boutique
results.overview: When a world-famous rapper offers a dream job for watching over a suitcase full of weed, a recovering addict must resist the temptation of relapse to leave her boring job at a vintage clothing store.

results.title: Don't Delete the Kisses
results.overview: When a reserved girl and her best friend fall for each other in a simulation of her own creation, she accidentally releases her own unresolved feelings of love and is forced to face them, risking their relationship in real life.

results.title: Archura Leaves the City Forever
results.overview: A lost forest spirit named Archura explores New York and tries to find a home while confronting an urban landscape that is rapidly taken over by luxury developments.

results.title: That Sinking Feeling
results.overview: Misty awakes with a cold in a bed unfamiliar to her. At the foot of the bed, the owner of the place, Ashton, obsessively attends to her. He claims to have saved Misty from an accident in which she drove her car into a lake. Misty has no memory of this event and questions why she would act in such a way in the first place. Instead of easing her worries, Ashton leaves Misty alone so she can rest, but promises to check back in later. While trapped alone in the room, increasingly strange occurrences happen to Misty, and glimpses of the accident begin to surface. What truly happened at the lake? Who is Ashton, and does he know more than he lets on?

results.title: The Space Between
results.overview: After a failed suicide attempt, art student Evangelina Roman finds herself in a surreal liminal space between life and death. There, she meets Evi, a 17th-century girl who helps Evangelina rediscover her passion and will to live through art and self-acceptance.

results.title: Me, You and the Cow
results.overview: Martina, addicted to her phone, is taken by her father to a rehab center with an unusual therapy: healing through bonding with cows. Far from Wi-Fi and close to what hurts, she will have to face what she’s been avoiding.

results.title: Around The Clock
results.overview: As a single mother, Irena has to divide her time between caring for her family and working a fulltime job, however, luckily, her coworkers and other women in her life that share her struggles try their best to help her out in this monotonous routine.

results.title: Egg Yolk Custard Bun
results.overview: At a dim sum table where food meets kink, three friends push playfulness and intimacy to its sticky, steamy edges—until a sudden interruption.

results.title: Man'mi
results.overview: A rumbling river and the call of a great hornbill echo through the rainforest… Flora, a six-year-old mixed-race girl, is imagining a story. Suddenly, the voice of her mother, Hortensia, brings her back to reality. Their reality: a modest life, filled with tender, joyful moments shared with her Baoulé aunts. Yet, an imperceptible shadow hangs over their happiness… Hortensia’s pain, caused by a genetic disease, seeps slowly into their daily lives.

results.title: Milo.TV
results.overview: A foreign kid is fascinated with livestreaming when one day, his dad creates a domain named after his son "Milo.TV". Originally used to help promote his construction company in the United States. Colsen, a music producer in Milo's class who's deep into online forums encourages Milo to keep going, believing livestreaming is "the future".

results.title: Viena koja aukščiau
results.overview: This documentary tells the story of Rapolas - an athlete who lost part of his leg following an unexpected injury, but refused to give up; he embarked on a career as a professional athlete, pursued his dreams, and is now reaching the pinnacle of his success.

results.title: North Fork Women
results.overview: A generation of lesbians who’ve had to rely on chosen family reflect on the work their community has done to age in place on the North Fork of Long Island.

results.title: Ambiguous Losses
results.overview: Two sisters who had been adopted internationally explore and compare their respective pasts for the first time. Their candid discussion reveals both an ambivalence toward their abandonment and the strength of their sisterly bond. By transforming their personal archives into a collage inspired by origami, Fanny Lord-Bourcier fills in the blurry areas of their shared history.

results.title: Simbioze 2.0
results.overview: Come, let's daydream in the arms of Mother Nature while our feet sink in deep mud, let's wash each other, I'll let you see a simple truth.

results.title: The Flower and the Flood
results.overview: After an atmospheric river decimates a saffron crop, floodwaters return Semá:th Xó:tsa to the valley after a century of destruction. Tracing Sumas Lake's history alongside saffron's renewal, Elisa González links ecological repair and cultural resurgence through hand-processed, analogue experiments, asking what saffron reveals about our bond with land.

results.title: Illustrated Legacies: Graveyard of the Pacific
results.original_title: Illustrated Legacies: Graveyard of the Pacific
results.overview: In his first feature-length documentary, Tanner Zurkoski gathers stories from knowledge-keepers, Indigenous researchers and historians to document early encounters between explorers and the Nuu-chah-nulth nations.

results.title: Face Your Fear
results.overview: Fear is a party… and you’re invited.

results.title: My Dear Dork
results.overview: This is the story of a man who wants to date and a woman who's happy with the way things are. Aside from sex, what's the difference between a friend and a lover? What makes a lover so special? Perhaps the word "love" is overrated, which is why I created this piece.

results.title: Body in Plural
results.overview: Body in Plural moves between bodies and buildings to trace how a single historic event continues to reverberate through time. From a 1988 mass performance in Yugoslavia to today's protests in Serbia, the film questions how freedom can still be imagined, not as possession, but as relation.

results.title: We Corrupted Few
results.overview: A BroHo documentary that tells the story of 4 schmucks, and how they sought to change the Overton Window by creating bizarre videos and pushing a philosophy of loving the corrupted.

results.title: Gen 25"
results.overview: Experience a study tour through this documentary, which follows the Class of 2025 from The British School Punta Arenas on their journey through the United Kingdom.

results.title: Fallen Stock
results.overview: Gi-hyuk and Taein drift through the day in a grocery delivery truck, repeating orders, reports, and instructions. Overhearing investors and stock manipulators, they glimpse the hidden workings of power yet change nothing. At the final destination, by the sea, Gi-hyuk walks on, silent and steady, like an ox.

results.title: Mirrorless City View
results.overview: I think of an ambiguous relationship between a woman from my hometown and a man from another city. They spent only a brief time together, yet could only keep talking. Unable to truly face one another, past scenes return to the surface of time. Was it a trace against the city's flow, or a reflection briefly allowed?

results.title: How to Be Left Behind
results.overview: Seonwoong, a high school student, lives alone with his mother, Eunkyeong. When she suddenly disappears, only her cellphone remains. Through it, Seonwoong begins to hear her voice and sets out to find her.

results.title: Someone's Summer
results.overview: A trip to the valley with two young children.

results.title: Girlboy
results.overview: A musing exploration of gender as a pink jacket in the hall closet, as explained by fish.

results.title: Essay: Doomed to Run
results.overview: Deeply personal cinematic journey between two worlds—Catholic Venice and Islamic Dagestan. Inspired by Joseph Brodsky’s essay *Watermark* and Merab Mamardashvili’s lectures on those “doomed to run,” I craft a film-essay about identity, the ache of existing between cultures, and the endless search for home. Through fragments of daily life and raw, intimate phone calls with my mother, I try to make sense of living on the border—between faiths, eras, wars, and pandemics.

results.title: Latitude Mesh
results.overview: A photographic emulsion is a photosensitive chemical compound used in film to create an image when exposed to light. Agnès' artisanal emulsion drives this work, crafted with the precision of a contemporary alchemist.
